front.title: A gold butter lamp
front.description:
An oversized, highly decorated lamp, more like a chalice with a wide cup, like those lamps they use up north to burn mammoth-butter in their rituals.

It's worth a fortune (Value 4), but there's more to this lamp than meets the eye.

list.description: To unlock its secrets, you must…
… consult with a disciple of the Rime Lords (or one of their troves of lore) to get the recipe and mantra that makes the lamp work.
… acquire the special ingredients for the clarified mammoth-butter to be burned in the lamp (Value 1).
… risk drawing the attention of one or more wraiths when you first light the lamp and utter the incantation.

back.title: Revealing Light
back.description:
When you spend a day preparing the special ingredients (Value 1) according to the secret recipe, you get a ◇ jar of magic butter (○○○○○ hours).

When you light the lamp and intone the mantra, the lamp gives off a pale, heatless light so long as you continue to chant. Within this light:

  • Active spirits are visible, even if they are not manifest
  • Illusions, glamours, and veils are stripped away
  • Shapechangers can be seen for what they truly are
  • Hidden things radiate a bright aura
  • Lies spoken are visible as black smoke that lingers near the ground

Alas, the light draws the ire of any wraiths (or other hungry undead spirits) nearby.

move.name: When you light the lamp and intone the mantra
move.description: The lamp gives off a pale, heatless light so long as you continue to chant. Within this light: active spirits are visible; illusions are stripped away; shapechangers are seen as they truly are; hidden things radiate aura; lies appear as black smoke. Alas, it draws the ire of any wraiths nearby.
